name: launch
title: Launch
description: A startup & SaaS marketing theme: product hero with a real screenshot slot in a CSS browser frame, feature sections, pricing from a data file. The signature is the changelog timeline — proof of life, one node per release.

tokens.--font-sans: all interface and body text (geometric-feeling system sans)
tokens.--font-mono: version chips, dates, code (the release-notes voice)
tokens.--tracking-tight: negative letter spacing for large headlines
tokens.--color-accent: links, focus rings, the live dot
tokens.--color-on-primary: text placed on the primary button
tokens.--color-new: the New release tag and its timeline node
tokens.--color-improved: the Improved release tag and its timeline node
tokens.--color-fixed: the Fixed release tag and its timeline node
tokens.--tint-chip: how strongly tag chips are tinted with their color
tokens.--tint-hero: how strongly the hero frame backdrop is tinted with the accent
tokens.--shadow-lift: the only shadow: hero frame and featured plan
tokens.--page-width: maximum page width (masthead, hero, plan grid)
tokens.--radius: corner rounding for buttons and chips
tokens.--radius-l: corner rounding for cards and the hero frame
